meaning: n.筏,救生艇,橡皮船,大量vi.乘筏vt.筏运,制成筏
examples: Several logs had been lashed together to make a raft.
"Are you sure the raft is safe?" she asked anxiously. "Couldn't be safer," Max assured her confidently.
My raft helps me cross the ocean of life.
The U.N. has also been debating a raft of ideas for more targeted global taxes.
Following instructions, we stash our sunscreen, don the vests and board the motorized raft.
